parameters.query:
SELECT
  co.id                  AS order_id,
  co.order_number,
  co.tenant_id,
  co.business_id,
  co.customer_chat_id,
  co.items,
  co.total_amount,
  co.delivery_type,
  co.customer_notes,
  co.status,
  co.created_at,
  c.display_name         AS customer_name,
  c.last_seen_at         AS customer_last_seen,
  bp.business_name,
  bp.business_mode,
  ac.agent_name,
  ac.tone_profile,
  pi.access_token        AS bot_token
FROM table_1 co
JOIN table_2 c
  ON c.business_id = co.business_id
  AND c.platform_id = co.customer_chat_id::text
  AND c.platform = 'telegram'
JOIN table_3 bp
  ON bp.id = co.business_id
JOIN table_4 ac
  ON ac.business_id = co.business_id
JOIN table_5 pi
  ON pi.business_id = co.business_id
  AND pi.platform = 'telegram'
  AND pi.is_active = true
WHERE co.status IN ('enquiry', 'placed')
  AND co.payment_status NOT IN ('confirmed', 'proof_submitted')
  AND co.created_at BETWEEN now() - interval '48 hours' AND now() - interval '6 hours'
  AND co.followup_sent_at IS NULL
  AND c.last_seen_at < co.created_at + interval '4 hours'
  AND c.last_seen_at < now() - interval '2 hours'
ORDER BY co.created_at ASC
